cases.name: Functions fallback remains audit-only and bounded
cases.notes: ARC prepares bounded requests and rejects any attempt to treat the fallback as direct fund-release authority.

cases.name: Unsupported or mismatched DON responses fail closed
cases.notes: Batch root, request id, chain id, and return-size mismatches are rejected deterministically.

cases.name: Anchor and watchdog jobs remain replay-safe and operator-controlled
cases.notes: Duplicate suppression, delayed-safe execution, and operator override are all explicit checks.

cases.name: CCIP coordination reconciles back to canonical ARC receipts
cases.notes: The shipped lane transports one settlement-coordination message family and records the canonical execution receipt id.

cases.name: Duplicate, delayed, and unsupported-chain CCIP deliveries fail closed
cases.notes: Duplicate deliveries are suppressed and late or wrong-chain deliveries remain explicit degraded outcomes.

cases.name: Machine-payment and paymaster compatibility remain explicit overlays
cases.notes: x402, Circle, EIP-3009, and ERC-4337 hooks stay subordinate to governed dispatch truth and explicit custody or reimbursement policy.
